OD Decision Engine

How to use: هذه أهم أداة في الـ Kit. أدخل أقل قدر من المعلومات: اسم الوحدة، سبب الطلب، مقترح الإدارة، ومقترح التطوير التنظيمي. الأداة تقارن بين 3 سيناريوهات: الوضع الحالي، مقترح الإدارة، ومقترح OD، ثم توصي إما باعتماد أحد المقترحات أو الإبقاء على الوضع الحالي بدون تعديل.
Current State-
Business Proposal-
OD Proposal-
Recommendation-

Decision Dashboard

Decision memo will appear here

Organization Design Study

How to use: استخدم هذه الأداة عند دراسة هيكل تنظيمي أو طلب تعديل تنظيمي. أدخل الوحدة، الوضع الحالي، التحديات، والأهداف. ستنتج الأداة دراسة تنظيمية تشمل التشخيص، مبادئ التصميم، الخيارات، التوصية، المخاطر، وخارطة التنفيذ.
Span of Control-
Manager Ratio-
Design Risk-
Organization design study will appear here

Organization Analyzer

How to use: Enter employees, managers, layers, departments, vacancies, and critical roles. The tool calculates OD indicators and produces an organization health analysis.
Span-
Manager Ratio-
Vacancy Rate-
Complexity-
Analysis will appear here

JD Builder

How to use: Build a new NHC-style job description using Job Family + Organizational Level + Functional Remits + Key Focus Areas. The generated JD uses the approved action verbs for each organizational level and can be exported in an NHC Job Description Card format.
Ready output will appear here

JD Quality & Enhancement

How to use: Paste any job description. The tool assesses quality, identifies gaps, scores it, and provides improvement recommendations.
Review output will appear here

Job Evaluation

How to use: أدخل المسمى والمهام ونطاق التأثير. الأداة تعطي تقييم وزن وظيفي استرشادي بناءً على عوامل عالمية شائعة. لا تمثل منهجية WTW أو Korn Ferry الرسمية.
Total Score-
Band-
Role Size-
Job evaluation report will appear here

Workforce Planning Calculator

How to use: Enter workload volume, handling time, productive hours, buffer, current FTE, and automation potential.
Required FTE-
With Buffer-
Gap-
Workforce analysis will appear here

Headcount Challenge Memo

How to use: Capture requested FTE and short justification. The tool generates a challenge memo.
Memo will appear here

Executive Pack Generator

How to use: Enter topic, background, and recommendation. The tool generates executive summary, risks, and storyline.
Executive pack will appear here

Policy Generator

How to use: Select document type, enter topic, scope, and rules. The tool creates a structured document.
Policy will appear here

RACI Generator

How to use: Enter process, stakeholders, and key activities. The tool generates a RACI matrix.
RACI will appear here

OD Request Tracker

How to use: Log OD requests locally in your browser. Export CSV when needed.

Privacy by Design

Works locallyNo external APINo uploadMinimal inputsBrowser local storage only for tracker

What not to enter

Do not enter employee personal data, compensation details, confidential names, or sensitive strategy details. Use summarized, anonymized descriptions.

Positioning

“NHC OD-Kit is an internal decision-support prototype. It accelerates analysis but does not replace professional judgment, formal approvals, or official governance.”

NHC OD-Kit Enterprise v1.0 — Private browser-based prototype. Outputs require professional review before official use.
